name: file-upload
description: Drag-and-drop file upload with preview, progress tracking, and server-side handling
author: AD AI Engine
instructions:
1. Import DropZone into your page for drag-and-drop uploads
2. DropZone handles file selection, previews, and progress internally
3. The API route at /api/upload stores files to the configured directory
4. Customize fileStorage.ts for S3/cloud storage integration
5. Set MAX_FILE_SIZE and ALLOWED_TYPES in the DropZone props
